caption: A man with dark hair pulled back and wearing glasses performs on a stage. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt under a black vest decorated with white embroidery, paired with a red and white patterned tie. He stands before a microphone on a stand and plays an acoustic guitar. Behind him are light-colored wooden wall panels. The back of the heads of several audience members are visible in the foreground. A black object with the white text "ORCA" is positioned on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man sings into the microphone, his mouth opening and closing. His hands move slightly as he plays the guitar, and his facial expression shifts while he performs.
